article.description: — Luka Doncic had 35 points, 13 assists, nine rebounds and five steals, and the Los Angeles Lakers rallied in the fourth quarter before surviving a frantic final second for their fifth consecutive victory, 118-116 over the San Antonio Spurs on...
article.headline: Doncic scores 35, and the Lakers survive a frantic final second for a 118-116 win over the Spurs

images.caption: The Lakers survive a late foul call after Julian Champagnie misses potential tying free throws for the Spurs.
images.name: Lakers survive late foul drama to top Spurs

keywords: San Antonio Spurs @ Los Angeles Lakers
article.linkText: Doncic scores 35, and the Lakers survive a frantic final second for a 118-116 win over the Spurs
article.story: LOS ANGELES -- — Luka Doncic had 35 points, 13 assists, nine rebounds and five steals, and the Los Angeles Lakers rallied in the fourth quarter before surviving a frantic final second for their fifth consecutive victory, 118-116 over the San Antonio Spurs on Wednesday night. The Lakers finished the game on a 21-10 run, but the Spurs got one last chance when Marcus Smart committed an inbound violation after Kelly Olynyk’s putback layup with 1.2 seconds left. Julian Champagnie then drew a foul from Jake LaRavia while trying to tip in the Spurs' inbound pass, but Champagnie missed his first free throw, and nobody could tip in the second miss at the buzzer. Deandre Ayton had 22 points and 10 rebounds for the Lakers, who extended their impressive start to the season with a furious rally from a nine-point deficit midway through the fourth quarter. Doncic scored eight points in the fourth, including a clutch go-ahead 3-pointer with 2:31 to play. Victor Wembanyama had 19 points and eight rebounds before fouling out with 1:39 to play for the Spurs, who have lost two straight after a 5-0 start. Stephon Castle and Jeremy Sochan had 16 points apiece. Doncic overcame a 9-for-27 shooting night with another handful of stellar plays as the Lakers won a foul-plagued game between two undermanned teams. Harrison Barnes and Sochan also fouled out in the fourth quarter. Los Angeles trailed 106-97 with just over seven minutes to play, but got back in it by holding San Antonio without a field goal for nearly 4 1/2 minutes. Doncic's fourth 3-pointer put the Lakers up 113-112, and Wembanyama fouled out on a charge drawn by Rui Hachimura two possessions later. Austin Reaves missed his second straight game with a hamstring injury, but Doncic returned after his absence from the Lakers' surprising win at Portland on Monday. Up next Spurs: Host Houston on Friday. Lakers: At Atlanta on Saturday. ------ AP NBA: https://apnews.com/NHL

videos.description: San Antonio Spurs vs. Los Angeles Lakers: Game Highlights
videos.headline: San Antonio Spurs vs. Los Angeles Lakers: Game Highlights

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (San Antonio Spurs vs. Los Angeles Lakers: Game Highlights) 2025/11/06 ESHEET

videos.description: Luka Doncic puts up 35 points as the Los Angeles Lakers dig deep in the fourth quarter to see off Victor Wembanyama and the San Antonio Spurs.
videos.headline: Luka shines for Lakers in win over Spurs

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Luka shines for Lakers in win over Spurs) 2025/11/06 ESHEET

videos.description: Julian Champagnie knocks down the 3-pointer plus the foul.
videos.headline: Champagnie swishes the 3 for the Spurs

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Champagnie swishes the 3 for the Spurs) 2025/11/06 ESHEET

videos.description: Victor Wembanyama blocks Deandre Ayton's shot attempt.
videos.headline: Wemby swats away Ayton's shot

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Wemby swats away Ayton's shot) 2025/11/06 ESHEET

videos.description: Victor Wembanyama is too quick for the Lakers as he rebounds his missed attempt and tips it in.
videos.headline: Wemby tips his own miss up and in

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Wemby tips his own miss up and in) 2025/11/06 ESHEET

videos.description: Luka Doncic finds a rolling Jaxson Hayes for an alley-oop slam for the Lakers.
videos.headline: Luka floats it for Jaxson Hayes

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Luka floats it for Jaxson Hayes) 2025/11/06 ESHEET

videos.description: Victor Wembanyama drives to the basket with authority and dunks it in for the Spurs.
videos.headline: Wemby rises above Bronny and slams it in

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Wemby rises above Bronny and slams it in) 2025/11/06 ESHEET

videos.description: Victor Wembanyama uses his strength to create space at Bronny James' expense and hits the jumper.
videos.headline: Wemby bodies Bronny and banks it in

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Wemby bodies Bronny and banks it in) 2025/11/06 ESHEET

videos.description: Bronny James drives in the lane and pulls back for two.
videos.headline: Bronny gets the fading jumper to fall

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Bronny gets the fading jumper to fall) 2025/11/06 ESHEET

videos.description: Luka Doncic double-teamed at the baseline zips a pass to Rui Hachimura for a Lakers 3-pointer.
videos.headline: Luka whirls a pass behind his head for a Rui 3

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Luka whirls a pass behind his head for a Rui 3) 2025/11/06 ESHEET

videos.description: Luka Doncic knocks down a 3-pointer with his signature step back.
videos.headline: Luka drains a 3 for his 20th point of the first half

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Luka drains a 3 for his 20th point of the first half) 2025/11/06 ESHEET

videos.description: Victor Wembanyama effortlessly gets into the paint and slams it in.
videos.headline: Wemby Eurosteps into a dunk

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Wemby Eurosteps into a dunk ) 2025/11/06 ESHEET

videos.description: Marcus Smart drives to the basket and gets the teardrop to fall.
videos.headline: Marcus Smart freezes Wemby with a floater

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Marcus Smart freezes Wemby with a floater ) 2025/11/06 ESHEET

videos.description: Luka Doncic finds Jarred Vanderbilt in the corner who knocks down the 3-pointer as the shot clock expires.
videos.headline: Vanderbilt bails Lakers out with first 3 of the season

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Vanderbilt bails Lakers out with first 3 of the season) 2025/11/06 ESHEET

videos.description: Luka Doncic draws two defenders and lobs it to Jaxson Hayes for an alley-oop jam.
videos.headline: Luka leaves it at the rim for Hayes

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Luka leaves it at the rim for Hayes) 2025/11/06 ESHEET

videos.description: Stephon Castle makes the Lakers pay by drilling a 3-pointer.
videos.headline: Castle cashes in a wide-open 3 for the Spurs

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Castle cashes in a wide-open 3 for the Spurs) 2025/11/06 ESHEET

videos.description: Luka Doncic turns away from his defender and feeds Jaxson Hayes for a throwdown plus the foul.
videos.headline: Luka spins and spots Hayes for slam

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Luka spins and spots Hayes for slam) 2025/11/06 ESHEET

videos.description: Stephon Castle comes up with the steal and finds Jeremy Sochan for the slam.
videos.headline: Castle creates and Sochan completes

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Castle creates and Sochan completes) 2025/11/06 ESHEET

videos.description: Victor Wembanyama picks up his sixth foul on his way to the basket.
videos.headline: Wemby fouls out and Lakers fans love it

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Wemby fouls out and Lakers fans love it) 2025/11/06 ESHEET
